name: Apple Sorbet #2
recipeIngredient: 3 large Granny Smith Apples; peeled, cored and pureed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and water in a saucepan over medium-high heat and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Allow syrup to come just before boiling, then remove from heat and let it cool.
3. Chill the syrup thoroughly.
4. Add the cooled syrup to the remaining ingredients (apples, lemon juice, Applejack, cinnamon, and nutmeg).
5. Blend well to combine all ingredients.
6. Freeze in an ice cream maker or freezer until desired consistency is reached.
